Onward (2020)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $61,555,145Details
International Box Office $71,763,323
Worldwide Box Office $133,318,468
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $8,667,264
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $11,778,593
Total $20,445,857
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Set in a suburban fantasy world, two teenage elf brothers embark on an extraordinary quest to discover if there is still a little magic left out there.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$39,119,861 (63.6% of total gross)
Legs:1.57 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:46.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$200,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,310 opening theaters/4,310 max. theaters, 2.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $80,196,022

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 6th, 2020 (Wide) by Walt Disney
International Releases: February 28th, 2020 (Wide), released as Frčíme (Czech Republic)
February 28th, 2020 (Wide), released as Bora Lá (Portugal)
March 5th, 2020 (Wide) (France)
March 5th, 2020 (Wide) (Spain)
March 5th, 2020 (Wide) (Germany)
Video Release: March 20th, 2020 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for action/peril and some mild thematic elements.
(Rating bulletin 2616 (Cert #52400), 2/12/2020)
Running Time: 114 minutes
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Shot in 3-D, IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, Family Bonding, Road Trip, Young Child Dealing with the Death of a Parent
Social setting: Urban Fantasy
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Walt Disney Pictures, Disney-Pixar
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
